narrative:
03 court of appeals district has 515,838 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -12.0% D−R vs -31.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
